activities_projects.title: Classification of Resources Table
activities_projects.objective: Understand different bases of resource classification
steps: Create a table with four columns: Origin, Exhaustibility, Ownership, Status of Development
Write definitions for each category
Provide two examples for each classification
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand systematic classification of resources

activities_projects.title: Case Study of Resource Rich Regions
activities_projects.objective: Analyze why some resource-rich regions remain economically backward
steps: Select one resource-rich region of India such as Jharkhand or Chhattisgarh
Identify the major resources present
Explain reasons why the region may still face economic challenges
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical understanding of resource distribution and development

activities_projects.title: Land Use Pattern Study
steps: List the five major land use categories
Explain each category with examples
Describe how population growth affects land use patterns
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the relationship between human activities and land utilization

activities_projects.title: Pie Chart of Land Use
activities_projects.objective: Interpret land use data using graphical representation
steps: Collect approximate land use percentage data of India
Draw a pie chart representing different land categories
Label and explain each segment
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop skills in interpreting geographical data visually

activities_projects.title: Land Degradation Causes Report
steps: List at least five causes of land degradation
Explain how each cause affects soil quality
Suggest preventive measures
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand environmental impacts of human activities

activities_projects.title: Soil Profile Diagram
steps: Draw a labeled diagram of a soil profile
Label topsoil, subsoil, substratum, and bedrock
Explain the importance of each layer
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the structure of soil formation

activities_projects.title: Soil Types Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare major soil types of India
steps: Choose three soil types such as alluvial, black, and red soil
Compare their characteristics in a table
Mention crops grown in each soil type
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand agricultural importance of different soils

activities_projects.title: Soil Conservation Techniques Study
steps: List conservation methods such as terrace farming, contour ploughing, strip cropping, and shelter belts
Explain how each technique reduces soil erosion
Provide examples where these methods are used
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn practical methods to protect soil resources

activities_projects.title: Sustainable Development Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of sustainable development
steps: Define sustainable development
Explain why resource conservation is important for future generations
Write three ways individuals can support sustainable development
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness about sustainable resource use

activities_projects.title: Resource Planning Process
activities_projects.objective: Understand the steps involved in resource planning
steps: Write the three stages of resource planning
Explain each stage briefly
Give examples related to India
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how planning helps in efficient resource utilization
